req: REQ-028 (ai4good Claude Code Skill (the volunteer single operating surface))

issues.detail: Inspecting seeded config cannot prove the clause "one login per project." An implementation that prompts on every session could still pass the stated inspection.
issues.fix: Exercise authentication: verify the first session requires one login, later sessions for the same project do not, and a different project requires its own login.

issues.detail: The round-1 rewrite still omits a sentinel/assertion for loaded "status," reduces "recent NGO comments" to an unread count, and leaves scope-summary and blocker consumption behind the unjudgeable phrase "demonstrably used." Those inputs can remain absent from session context while the named banner fields pass.
issues.fix: Split context loading from banner rendering. Seed unique status, scope, blocker, comment text, and runway values and assert each in an inspectable session-context/output oracle; separately assert the required concise banner fields.

issues.detail: No task-system update is attempted after auth failure, so an empty local queue could satisfy "updates queue locally and surface at session end."
issues.fix: For both bootstrap-time and mid-session failures, attempt a distinct task update, assert that exact update is stored locally, and assert its pending state is shown at session end while work and metering continue.

issues.detail: The amended matrix is not "every behavior." It omits at least the completion-readiness behavior and manual access to bootstrap context such as scope summary, project status, and in-progress tasks.
issues.fix: Add parameterized manual-route cases for completion readiness and all omitted bootstrap/context behaviors, with an observable result for each.

issues.detail: Requiring task/binding context on every Lovable audit record is not stated by REQ-028. Lovable calls are not the metered requests covered by task binding, and REQ-021 explicitly excludes per-task attribution of Lovable credit consumption.
issues.fix: Assert that the orchestrated call produces a corresponding audit record and is attributable to the volunteer; remove task/binding context unless a separate requirement explicitly mandates it.

issues.detail: The assertion that the Lovable cap and provider-side fuel stop are "the only spend bounds" contradicts REQ-009, which also requires provider workspace rate limits and a coarse monthly spend fuse. REQ-028 prohibits Skill-side guardrails, not those external provider controls.
issues.fix: Scope the assertion to absence of Skill-side caps, estimates, and refusal thresholds; acknowledge that REQ-009's provider-side rate limits, key-status stop, and catastrophe fuse remain in force.

issues.detail: The coverage map was not updated for the round-1 additions: it omits auto-update test 23 and audit-log test 24. Its first row also still says "ai4good repos only," resurrecting the unstated exclusion explicitly removed from AT-028.01.
issues.fix: Remove "only," map auto-updating through the standard Skill channel to AT-028.23, and add the orchestrated-call audit clause mapped to AT-028.24.
